Crate Sized Mag of Holding.Description:
An enormous, ridiculously spacious ammo container shaped like an oversized magazine
It defies weight, space, and common sense, capable of holding entire arsenals of different kinds of ammunition
Some SCAV discovered it in a ruined warehouse and, assuming it was a drum mag for some foreign weapon, tried loading it into his weapon
When the gun refused to reload, he gave up, only to realize later that he could still use it to store his ammo, just not the way he originally intended
